title: Integrate AACT/ClinicalTrials.gov study records as aggregate metadata only
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Registered-study records are integrated as aggregate registry metadata ONLY -- no participant/patient data of any kind. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Integrate AACT/ClinicalTrials.gov study records holding only aggregate registry metadata, via the approved channel, with full provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Study records hold only aggregate registry metadata (NCT ID, title, sponsor, phase, status, public summary). No participant/patient data of any kind (reviewer verifies explicitly).
Sourced via the approved AACT/ClinicalTrials.gov channel; acceptable-use terms respected (no implied endorsement); 100% provenance + retrievedAt.
output: data/clinicaltrials/ aggregate study-record metadata, committed via PR.
